Cava Bars (specialized, lively, authentic)
* El Xampanyet (El Born): Legendary, always buzzing, with cava by the glass and tasty tapas.
* Can Paixano (La Xampanyeria) (Barceloneta): Famous, loud, and fun  cheap cava bottles and sandwiches. Go early, it gets packed.
* La Vinya del Senyor (in front of Santa Maria del Mar): More refined, great cava list by the glass.
 Wine Bars & Restaurants (chic & curated)
* Monvinic (Eixample): One of the most famous wine bars in the world, with cava among many wines.
* Celler de la Boqueria (inside La Boqueria Market): Small wine stall with cava tastings.
* Bubó Tapas Bar (El Born): Stylish spot with cava and creative tapas.
 Shops to Buy Bottles
* Vila Viniteca (El Born): Huge selection of Catalan cava.
* Lafuente Vinos y Licores (near Plaça Catalunya): Good cava range.
* La Vinoteca Torres (Passeig de Gràcia): Elegant shop with cava from Torres and more.
 Day Trips (if you want to go to the source)
* Sant Sadurní dAnoia (about 40 min by train): The cava capital. You can tour Freixenet, Codorníu, Gramona, Recaredo, etc. Most offer tastings.

Antilla Salsa Barcelona
 Carrer Viladomat, 211, 08015 Barcelona
 4.1/5 (1077 reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Offers salsa, timba, and bachata nights on Wednesdays, Saturdays, and Sundays. Known for its vibrant atmosphere and friendly crowd.
Mojito Club
 Carrer del Rosselló, 217, 08008 Barcelona
 3.0/5 (139 reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Stylish venue known for its salsa and bachata nights, and its own dance school.
Dio Club
 Carrer del Perill, 10, 08012 Barcelona
 4.0/5 (27 reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Offers a variety of dance styles, including salsa and bachata, with workshops and social dance nights.
ACM CitY
 Av. Catalunya, 49, 08290 Cerdanyola del Vallès, Barcelona
 4.5/5 (based on user reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Latin dance hall offering salsa, bachata, kizomba, and more, with sessions every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday.
Morena Barcelona
 Carrer d'Aragó, 122, 08015 Barcelona
 4.4/5 (37 reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Ideal place to dance salsa in Castelldefels, open every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday.
Rooftop Tango Lesson & Drinks
 Carrer del Vidre, 10, 08002 Barcelona
 4.9/5 (216 reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Enjoy a one-of-a-kind cultural experience with a small-group rooftop tango lesson, hosted by a professional Argentinian tango dancer.
Somoloco Dance Immersion
 Barcelona
 4.7/5 (based on user reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 Offers 14 week dance and cultural immersion programs in Barcelona, including salsa, bachata, zouk, kizomba, tango, or flamenco.
Parc de la Ciutadella  Cascada Area
 Pg. de Pujades (Pg. de Picasso), 08005 Barcelona
 4.8/5 (3734 reviews)
 Website
 Google Maps
 A popular outdoor spot for free salsa and bachata sessions, especially on weekends.
